titleStmt.title: SII 23.353: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 353. (A.R. No. 353 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 17: 1193-94 A.D.

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Kumbha, ba. 1, Monday, Anusham but are irregular.

This registers a sale of land which was tank-irrigated and which measured 2 mā, 3 kāṇi and odd in extent for 800 kāśu to the temple of Tiruviśalūr-Uḍaiyār by Amudāṇḍāḷ-Sāni, wife of Gōmaḍattu Yajñamaṇināyaka-Bhaṭṭa of Kiḻānaḍichchēri a quarter of Vēmbaṟṟūr, with her son Śrīrāma-Bhaṭṭa acting on her behalf as mudukaṇ (guardian). The land is said to have formed part of a bigger plot presented by her husband to her and to her son (another) Mahādēva-Bhaṭṭa, the latter of whom had previously sold his share to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ— tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉeḻāvatu kumbhanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu pratamaiyum tiṅkaḷ
kkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aṉiḻattunāḷ Uṭaiyār Irājarājiśvaramuṭai yār tevatāṉam virutarāyapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭu vem paṟṟūrāṉa Etirilicoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattu kiḻānaṭicceriko
maṭattu yaññamaṇināyakapaṭṭaṉ pirāmaṇi Amutāṇṭāḷ cāṇiyeṉ Eṉ makaṉ cirāmapaṭṭaṉai mutukaṇṇāka koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Innāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvicalūruṭaiyār koyil mulavṛtti Āticaṇṭeśva
ratevar tiruvaruḷāl Ikkoyil śrīkāriyam ceyvārukkum śrīmāheśva rakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkkum tevakaṉmi koyiṟkaṇakkarkkum Iṟṟaināḷāl viṟṟukkuṭutta kuḷappuṉcey nilamāvatu Ivvūr mutaṟkaṭṭil Irācarā
cavatikku kiḻakku keraḷāntakavāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñcatirattu nāṉ Eṉ pattāviṉpakkal pirutitāṉat tāl peṟṟuṭaiyenāy Eṉṉutāyiruntum Eṉ makaṉ mātevapaṭṭa ṉutāyiruntu
m Ippaṭiyāl Eṅkaḷutāyirunta Ūrppaṭik kuḷappuṉcai nilamummā varai Araikkāṇi mukkāl muntirikaiyuṅ kiḻmākāṇikkum kiḻpāṟ kellai piṟāntūr tiruvaraṅkatevapaṭṭa Ātittiyār maka
ṉ Ārāvamutupaṭṭaṉ nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpālkellai kaḻaṉivāyiluṭaiyāṉ viḷai nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai matiālai Āṟṟukkut teṟkkum
Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaiuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa Uḷpaṭṭa nila mummā varai Araikkāṇi mukkāl muntirikaiyiṉkiḻ mākāṇi Itil Immāteva paṭṭaṉukku nilaṅkalantavāṟṟāl kūṟāy Innāyaṉārkku Ivaṉ muṉ
ṉāḷil nirvārttu kuṭutta nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikai nikki Eṉṉutāṉa nilam Iraṇṭu mā mukkāṇi ciṉṉammum viṟṟu kuṭuttu koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu Eṇṇūṟum Āva
ṇakkaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccelavaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutteṉ Ikkoyil śrīkāriyam ceyvārkkum śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇi cey vārkaḷukkum tevakaṉmi koyiṟkaṇakkaṉukkum Ivamutāṇṭāḷ cāṉiye
kku Ituve vilaiyāvatākavum Ituve poruḷmāvaṟuti poruḷ celavolai Āvatākavum Itu Allatu veṟuporuḷ māvaṟutiporuḷ cila Ōlai kāṭṭakkaṭavatallātatākavum Innilattukku Ivarkaḷ veṇ ṭiṉa pe vilaiyāvaṇa
m paṇṇikuṭukkakaṭaveṉākavum kuṭuttilenākil Inta Icaivutiṭṭe piramāṇam Āvatākavum Ippaṭi Icaintu vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvicalūru
ṭaiyār koyilil cikāriyañceyvārkkum śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇicey vārkaḷukkum tevakaṉmi koyiṟkaṇakkarkkum Ikkomaṭattu Ecca maṇi nātapaṭṭaṉ pirāmaṇi Eṉmakaṉ cirāmapaṭṭaṉai mutu
mutāṇṭāḷ cāṉiyeṉ Ivarkaḷ Arttikka nilavilaippiramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭu Eḻutineṉ Iruṅkaṇṭi ciriḷaṅkopaṭṭaṉ makaṉ cirāmapaṭṭa ṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Icaintu Eṉ mātāvukku mutu kācu Eṇṇūṟum
kku kuṭuttu Ikkuḷappuñcai nilam Iraṇṭumā mukkāṇic ciṉṉamum maikku komaṭattu cirāmacaṉmaneṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Irāyūr tevapaṭṭaneṉ māṅkaḷūr tirucci
ṟṟampalanampiyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vempaṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ Āṇṭapiḷḷai Āṉantakūttan paṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ muppirāl nārāyaṇa paṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kuṇṭūr kovintapaṭṭaneṉ ṉavaṅkipuṟattu dakṣiṇā
muttipaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ālaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Aruḷāḻi Accutaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ piṟāntūr tiruvaraṅkappaṭṭacomāci yār makaṉ Ārāamutupaṭṭaneṉ ..
Digital edition of SII 23.353 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
